scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:client
scripts.clear: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec -T postgres psql -U waken -d waken -c 'TRUNCATE worlds, world_members, player_data, world_state CASCADE;' && docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec -T redis redis-cli FLUSHALL && echo '✓ Database cleared!'
scripts.server:deploy: rsync -az --exclude node_modules --exclude dist -e "ssh -i ./wakenssh -o IdentitiesOnly=yes" ./server/ root@178.104.59.213:/opt/waken/server/ && rsync -az -e "ssh -i ./wakenssh -o IdentitiesOnly=yes" ./client/public/assets/ root@178.104.59.213:/opt/waken/client/public/assets/ && ssh -i ./wakenssh -o IdentitiesOnly=yes root@178.104.59.213 "cd /opt/waken/server && pm2 restart waken-lobby --update-env"
scripts.server:restart: ssh -i ./wakenssh -o IdentitiesOnly=yes root@178.104.59.213 "cd /opt/waken/server && pm2 restart waken-lobby --update-env"
scripts.server:clear: ssh -i ./wakenssh -o IdentitiesOnly=yes root@178.104.59.213 "docker compose -f /opt/waken/docker-compose.dev.yml exec -T postgres psql -U waken -d waken -c 'TRUNCATE worlds, world_members, player_data, world_state CASCADE;' && docker compose -f /opt/waken/docker-compose.dev.yml exec -T redis redis-cli FLUSHALL && echo '✓ Database cleared!'"
